query:
UPDATE chat_runs
               SET input_path = NULL,
                   output_path = NULL,
                   raw_log_path = NULL,
                   meta_path = NULL,
                   log_state = 'pruned',
                   artifact_state = 'pruned',
                   pruned_at = $2,
                   prune_reason = $3,
                   retention_summary_json = COALESCE($4, retention_summary_json)
               WHERE id = $1
